valid.name: no-direction
valid.code:
-- No explicit ASC/DESC: rule does not fire.
SELECT id FROM users ORDER BY created_at;

valid.name: with-nulls-last
valid.code: SELECT id FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC NULLS LAST;

invalid.name: desc
invalid.code: SELECT id FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC;

errors.message: `ORDER BY ... ASC|DESC` without `NULLS FIRST` / `NULLS LAST` relies on PostgreSQL's implicit ordering (NULLS LAST for ASC, NULLS FIRST for DESC), which trips up cross-database readers. Add an explicit `NULLS FIRST` / `NULLS LAST`.
